instructions.text: Test your memory with and without notes
instructions.audio: Let's see how notes help you remember

rounds.title: Round 1: No Notes
rounds.instruction: Listen to this list once. No writing!
rounds.audio: hammer, screwdriver, wrench, pliers, drill, saw, level, tape measure

rounds.title: Round 2: With Notes
rounds.instruction: Listen and write down each item
rounds.audio: apple, banana, orange, grape, strawberry, blueberry, mango, kiwi

insights: Writing creates a backup for your brain
The more items, the more notes help

tryAgain.message: Try again - really focus on writing everything
